# MDA Standards: Reports

## WHY?

- Provides a baseline for client reports
- Consistent layout, fonts, and page numbers across all solution reports

## Naming

The report name must resonate with the client user. Group related reports by category:

- `Finance - Payment Report`
- `Finance - Invoice Report`

## Layout Requirements

| Element | Standard |
|---|---|
| **Orientation** | Landscape (default for all reports) |
| **Header - Report Name** | Same as the report's registered name (for traceability) |
| **Header - Client Name/Logo** | Solution name or client name/logo |
| **Footer - Page Number** | Current page number |
| **Footer - Generated On** | Date and time the report was generated |
